title: Death'sCut
description: Death’s Cut adds a survival twist to Minecraft: when you die, you lose the loot in 50% of your inventory slots at random - harsher than Vanilla, but lighter than Hardcore.
body:
# ⚔️ Death’sCut - Mod
Not quite Hardcore - not quite Vanilla.

Death’sCut changes the way dying feels in Minecraft by making you lose the items in 50% of your inventory slots when you die. It’s random, it’s punishing, and it makes every adventure feel riskier than before.
![Death'sCut-Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ceb91dc2eff793e29f0482ebf44badace33f940_0.webp)

## 🌑 Features
- 50% Random Loss on Death - when you die, half of your inventory slots are cleared.
- Unpredictable Survival - no more keeping everything safe, every death cuts deep.
- Balanced Challenge - harsher than Vanilla, but still more forgiving than Hardcore.

## 🪓 Why Play Death’sCut?
If you want death to matter without the finality of Hardcore, this mod is for you. Every fall into lava, every creeper blast, every mistake comes with weight - making survival more thrilling.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
